raw.reasoning: All permission layers working: dotfile compiler, token scoping, server-side ACL enforcement, mount client filtering, fsnotify change detection, readonly revert

retrospective.summary: Work on the relay is functional end-to-end. Codex tested successfully in sandboxed workspace. secrets/ and .env invisible, README.md read-only, src/ writable. All enforced via relayauth tokens + relayfile ACLs + mount client filtering.
